assumptions: same session, room, device, gain, and microphone distance

warnings: [PAIR_DURATION_MISMATCH] Deliberate and Urgent differ in duration by more than 35%; text or trimming may differ.
[PAIR_DURATION_MISMATCH] Deliberate and Urgent differ in duration by more than 35%; text or trimming may differ.
[RECORDING_PROTOCOL] Recorded-level deltas require back-to-back takes with identical device, gain, distance, room, and disabled auto-gain/voice enhancement.
interpretation: Descriptive acoustic attributes only; not emotion labels, perceptual judgments, or a quality score.
